description_long: This object represents a human figure dressed in a dark police uniform, with a helmet or cap on the head and a visible utility belt around the waist. The figure's posture suggests a dynamic stance, possibly in motion or ready for action, with elongated limbs and angular features. The uniform appears to be a single-piece or closely matching set, primarily in dark blue or black, with some lighter highlights and a glossy finish. The headgear is rounded and covers the top of the head, resembling a tactical helmet. The surface of the figure is highly reflective, with sharp, faceted geometry and a semi-transparent quality in some areas. No clear police insignia, badge, or detailed facial features are visible due to the abstract and stylized rendering.
description: A stylized police officer figure in a dark, glossy uniform with a helmet and utility belt, featuring angular, reflective surfaces and elongated limbs.
description_view_0: The figure's upper body, helmet, and part of the utility belt are visible, with the right arm extended and the reflective, angular surfaces prominent.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the elongated limbs and the abstract, faceted geometry, with less detail visible on the torso and head.
description_view_2: A clearer profile of the helmet and upper torso, with the utility belt and arm positions more defined, showing the figure's dynamic posture.
description_view_3: The lower body and legs are more visible, highlighting the angular, stretched proportions and the glossy, dark material.
attribute_uniform_type: Dark, glossy patrol uniform with long sleeves and matching pants, featuring a tactical helmet and utility belt.
attribute_headgear_style: Rounded tactical helmet, dark color, smooth surface, no visible insignia.
